(1 comment)

Patch Set 9:

I don't see another patch which is adding support for "lfs getstripe" or "lfs find" to find and print out "mdt" layout files?

Patch Set 9:

(3 comments)

The lustre/doc/lfs-setstripe.1 man page needs to be updated, as well as the lfs.1 man page for "lfs getstripe" and "lfs find".  It would be even better if those commands were split into their own lfs-getstripe.1 and lfs-find.1 man pages.

If you are going to update this patch, it would be best if the man page update (just to document new "-L" usage) was included here.  If you are going to split lfs.1 into a separate man page, then that should be done in a separate patch.

parents.subject: LU-3285 lod: add support for DOM

commit.subject: LU-3285 lfs: add parameter for Data-on-MDT file
commit.message:
LU-3285 lfs: add parameter for Data-on-MDT file

Add --layout|-L parameter to lfs setstripe to create
file with data on MDT layout.
Add DoM size limit at LOD level - lod.dom_stripesize
parameter.

Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mike.pershin@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ib97142cc23c75e890dc619c14e5ffb3f3c47cda5
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/28012
Reviewed-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
